notes: When a task is assigned and the app is open, you now get a colourful in-app popup (like the sign-up screen) with a 'View task' button that jumps straight to the Tasks board and highlights the new task — on both the app and the web. Task notifications now also appear while the app/tab is in the foreground. Plus: important employee details (designation, department, joining date, addresses, and KYC & bank fields) are now required when EDITING an employee too, not just when adding one.
